articles.title: Funny Statue for Terry Jones
articles.summary: A statue of Terry Jones, a funny actor from the Monty Python comedy group, will be shown in Colwyn Bay, Wales, where he was born. Terry Jones died in 2020 at age 77 from a rare brain disease. The statue shows him as a funny character: a naked man playing an organ. His friend Michael Palin said Terry would think the statue is very funny. Many famous people helped raise money for the statue, and they got enough money in six months. The sculptor worked very hard for a year and a half to make the statue perfect. The statue also includes a desk with books because Terry wrote history books too. People will see the statue on Saturday near the beach.

articles.title: TikTok Helps Choose What Books You Read
articles.summary: Have you ever wanted to read a book because someone told you it was good? Many people now find books on TikTok, a social media app where people share short videos. On TikTok, there is a group called BookTok where people talk about books they love. They make videos that are fast and fun, and they share their feelings about stories. Because of this, a new list of the most popular books on BookTok has been made in the UK. This list uses sales numbers from bookstores and how many times a book is talked about on TikTok. The first list had all women writers. One writer, Chloe Walsh, had six books on the list. Some books from many years ago, like The Secret History from 1992, became popular again because of TikTok. Many books on the list are also going to be movies or TV shows. This shows that TikTok is changing how people find and like books.

articles.title: Touring is Hard for Small Bands, but Harry Styles is Helping
articles.summary: Brown Horse is a band from Norwich, England. They love making music and playing shows. But touring is very expensive. They sell T-shirts to make extra money. Sometimes they sleep on friends' floors or drive a very old van to save money. Many small bands have the same problem. Now, famous singers like Harry Styles are helping. They add a small fee to their concert tickets. This money goes to a charity that helps small bands. Brown Horse got some of this money. They will use it to pay for hotels and to pay themselves for the first time in a year. They are very thankful. This help makes touring a little easier for them.

articles.title: Loud Eaters and Phones Ruin Cinema Trips
articles.summary: Going to the movies can be fun, but sometimes other people ruin it. They talk loudly, eat noisily, or use their phones during the film. The writer had a bad experience watching a movie called Project Hail Mary. Someone was translating the movie for another person, and others were on their phones. A family even had a whole picnic! At another movie, a woman ate a big chocolate heart with a crinkly wrapper. People try to stop the noise by saying 'shh' or talking to the offenders, but it still distracts everyone. A TikToker named Cerys Hawkes says going to early shows or smaller cinemas can help avoid disruptions. She once saw two men filming themselves with flash on during a scary movie. They only stopped when staff came. Some people even throw popcorn or bring chickens to the cinema! It's important to be quiet so everyone can enjoy the film.

articles.title: China's Big Car Company BYD Says It Doesn't Need the US
articles.summary: BYD is a car company from China that makes electric cars. Electric cars run on batteries instead of gas. Because gas prices are high, more people want electric cars. BYD is selling many cars in countries like Brazil and the UK. But BYD does not sell many cars in the United States. A leader at BYD said they can be successful without the US. BYD is also making new technology that lets cars charge very fast. This means drivers can add many miles of driving in just a few minutes. Many car companies showed their cars at the Beijing Auto Show in China. Chinese car companies are becoming more popular around the world. They are not just cheap anymore; they have good technology too.

articles.title: Cameron Norrie Wins a Tough Tennis Match
articles.summary: Cameron Norrie is a tennis player from Britain. He played a match in Madrid, Spain. He won against Tomas Machac, who is from the Czech Republic. The match was very exciting and close. Norrie won the first set easily. In the second set, he almost won but Machac fought back and won that set. In the third set, Norrie was losing at first, but he tried very hard and won the final tie-break. He said it was one of his favorite matches because the crowd was amazing and he had to work really hard. Now he will play another match against either Tommy Paul or Thiago Agustin Tirante. Another British player, Katie Boulter, lost her match. The world number one, Jannik Sinner, also won his match.
